debug_info.goal:
case h
f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ
F : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
ℓ : ℕ → ℝ
hfint : ∀ (n : ℕ), HasIntegral (f n) a b (ℓ n)
hfF : UnifConv f F
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
N n : ℕ
hn : n ≥ N
M : ℕ
hN : ∀ (x : ℝ), |f n x - F x| < ε / (b - a)
⊢ |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε

failed_attempts:
rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  have := RiemannSum_bound_lt M hab _ _ hN
  rwa [div_mul_cancel₀ _ (ne_of_gt (sub_pos.mpr hab))] at this

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  apply lt_of_lt_of_eq (RiemannSum_bound M hN)
  field_simp
  linarith

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  have := RiemannSum_bound_lt hab hN
  rwa [div_mul_cancel _ (by bound)] at this

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  apply lt_of_le_of_lt (RiemannSum_abs_le _ _ _ _)
  convert RiemannSum_lt_of_lt hab hN
  rw [RiemannSum_const]
  field_simp [ne_of_gt (sub_pos.mpr hab)]

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  by_cases hM : M = 0
  · simp [hM, hε]
  · apply lt_of_le_of_lt (abs_RiemannSum_le _ _ _ _)
    calc
      RiemannSum (fun x ↦ |f n x - F x|) a b M
      _ < RiemannSum (fun x ↦ ε / (b - a)) a b M := RiemannSum_lt_of_lt hab hM hN
      _ = (ε / (b - a)) * (b - a) := RiemannSum_const _ _ _ hM
      _ = ε := by field_simp [sub_ne_zero.mpr (ne_of_gt (sub_pos.mpr hab))]

convert RiemannSum_close (f n) F a b M (ε / (b - a)) hN hab
  rw [div_mul_cancel₀]
  bound
sorry

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  rcases M with _ | M
  · simp [RiemannSum, hε]
  · calc |RiemannSum (fun x ↦ f n x - F x) a b (M + 1)|
      _ ≤ RiemannSum (fun x ↦ |f n x - F x|) a b (M + 1) := RiemannSum_abs_le _ _ _ _
      _ < RiemannSum (fun x ↦ ε / (b - a)) a b (M + 1) := RiemannSum_lt_RiemannSum hab hN
      _ = ε := by simp [RiemannSum_const]; field_simp [hab.ne']

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  apply lt_of_lt_of_eq (RiemannSum_bound hN hab)
  field_simp [hab.ne']

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  apply lt_of_lt_of_eq (RiemannSum_bound hab hN)
  field_simp
  bound

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  convert RiemannSum_bound_lt hab hN M
  field_simp
  linarith

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  convert RiemannSum_bound_lt hab hN
  field_simp; linarith

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  convert RiemannSum_bound_lt hab hN
  field_simp
  bound

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  convert RiemannSum_lt_bound hab (fun x ↦ hN x) M
  field_simp; linarith

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  apply lt_of_le_of_lt (RiemannSum_abs_le _ _ _ _)
  rcases eq_or_ne M 0 with rfl | hM
  · simp [hε]
  · apply lt_of_le_of_lt (RiemannSum_lt_of_lt hab hN hM)
    rw [RiemannSum_const _ hM]
    field_simp [ne_of_gt (sub_pos.mpr hab)]

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  convert RiemannSum_bound_lt hab hN
  rw [div_mul_cancel₀ _ (by bound)]

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  convert RiemannSum_bound_lt hN hab
  field_simp
  linarith

rw [← RS_sub]
  calc |RiemannSum (f n - F) a b M|
    _ < (ε / (b - a)) * (b - a) := RS_bound_lt _ hN
    _ = ε := by bound

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  convert RiemannSum_bound hab hN
  field_simp [hab.ne']

rw [← RS_sub]
  convert RS_bound_strict hab hN
  field_simp
  linarith

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  convert RiemannSum_bound_lt hab _ hN
  field_simp [sub_ne_zero.mpr (ne_of_gt hab)]

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  have := RiemannSum_bound_lt hab hN
  field_simp [ne_of_gt (by bound)] at this
  exact this

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  convert RiemannSum_bound hab M hN
  field_simp [ne_of_gt (sub_pos.mpr hab)]

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  apply RiemannSum_small hab hN

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  convert RiemannSum_bound_lt hab hN using 1
  field_simp [sub_ne_zero.mpr (ne_of_gt hab)]
sorry

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  have := RiemannSum_bound hab (ε / (b - a)) hN
  field_simp at this
  exact this

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  have := abs_RiemannSum_lt_bound (ε / (b - a)) hN
  rwa [div_mul_cancel₀ _ (by linarith)] at this

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  convert RiemannSum_bound hab hN using 1
  field_simp [sub_pos.mpr hab]

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  convert RiemannSum_bound hab hN
  field_simp
  linarith

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  convert RiemannSum_bound (f n - F) a b M _ (by bound) hN
  field_simp [sub_ne_zero.mpr (ne_of_gt hab)]

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  have := RiemannSum_bound_lt hab hN
  rwa [div_mul_cancel₀ _ (by linarith)] at this

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  convert RiemannSum_lt_bound hab hN
  field_simp
  bound

rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
  apply lt_of_le_of_lt (abs_RiemannSum_le _ _ _ _)
  cases M with
  | zero => simp [hε]
  | succ M =>
    convert RiemannSum_lt_of_lt hab (fun x ↦ hN x) (by simp)
    rw [RiemannSum_const]
    field_simp [hab.ne]
